rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE IN RE THE TATE FAMILY TRUST – SURVIVOR’STRUST DATED JANUARY 13, 2024
rulings.Calendar Matter: Valerie Fowler'S Verified Petition For Orders: (1) Suspension And Removal Of Janelle Green As Co-Trustee; (2) Appointment Of Kim Coleman, Pfac, As Successor Trustee; (3) Requiring Respondent To Provide An Accounting In Accordance With Probate Code 1060 Et Seq.; (4) Compelling The Return Of Property Wrongfully Taken, Recovery Of Compensatory Damages And Double Damages Pursuant To Probate Code 850-859; (5) Requiring Respondent To Hold Settlor'S Property In A Constructive Trust For The Benefit
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Notice of Hearing did not mark the box that indicates that 859 relief is being requested. 2) The property being requested to be returned is not adequately described in the petition and notice. 3) The response by Janelle Green was not verified. An unverified pleading may be proved by filing a supplemental declaration that identifies the pleading by caption and its filing date. 4) Petitioner requests inconsistent dates for an accounting: page 6, par. 32 requests an accounting from the day after father's death (11/14/23) but page 8, par. 49 requests an accounting from the day trustee assumed control of trust assets (1/13/24). Remote appearances may be made. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.
